Task: Cloud hosting setup (AWS / GCP / Azure / Vercel / Netlify)
CDN configured for static assets (Cloudflare, CloudFront)
CI/CD pipeline for automated build & deployment
Environment configuration management (.env files, secrets manager)
Input validation and sanitization to prevent injection attacks
Data encryption (at rest and in transit)
GDPR/CCPA compliance (user data consent, delete request handling)
Privacy policy and terms of use published
UI/UX tests (manual or automated e2e with Cypress, Playwright)
Fallbacks and retry mechanisms for failed API calls
Application performance monitoring (APM) (New Relic, Datadog, Sentry)
CDN and asset minification for frontend performance
Blue/green or canary deployments (optional but ideal)
Backup & restore plan (database snapshots, file storage)
Rate limiting and throttling to avoid abuse
Event tracking setup (page views, button clicks, conversions)
Feedback collection (NPS surveys, user feedback forms)
Internal documentation for deployment, issue handling
Knowledge base / help center for end-users
Training for internal teams (Sales, Support, Ops)
